text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Uhhh, Trainer. There's something<n>I'd like to talk
to you about real<n>quick...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital stops me while I'm<n>walking down
the hallway.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't happen to know a good<n>way to
swap out Tachyon's socks<n>without her knowing,
would you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right. Well, when I passed her in<n>the hallway
earlier, I noticed her<n>knee-highs were sagging just
a<n>smidge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My guess is the elastic is starting to<n>go. I must
have missed it when I was<n>folding and putting
away the laundry.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not what you're thinking! It's<n>just Tachyon
never puts away her<n>clean clothes, and I don't
want them<n>to get mixed up with her dirty ones!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But look at what my sloppy work has<n>done. It
must be annoying for her<n>having her knee-highs
constantly<n>sagging.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to swap them out!<n>And in order
to protect her honor, I<n>wanna prevent her from
knowing<n>anything!

Bravo! What a perfectly wonderful<n>display of
friendship!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital! The sight of you anguishing<n>over the threat
to your friend's good<n>name tugs at my
heartstrings.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You've inspired me to impart a<n>technique to you
that can be used to<n>keep your torch of friendship
aflame.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: S-seriously?! Yes, please!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, you must choose! Will you go<n>on the
offensive and boldy swap the<n>socks by force, or
would you prefer<n>the elegance of a more delicate
method?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll take either method with open<n>arms!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In that case, perhaps your trainer can<n>choose in
your stead.
choice_data_list: Let's seize them in a show of force!
Smart and elegant, if you please.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Let us paint your<n>friendship in the
fierce shades of<n>battle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You called for me. What is it you<n>need?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmph... You can help with this!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is Opera O offering her the socks?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon! I challenge thee!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaagh! No, it's a challenge!Things are getting seriously moe!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A duel between Opera O and Tachyon!<n>Fwoojhh!
This is the stuff of every<n>otaku's dreams!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Who wouldn't want to see two polar<n>opposites
paired together? The arts<n>against the sciences!
Talk about<n>prime shipping material!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes... To put it another way, it's like a<n>duel
between a knight commander<n>and an arch wizard!
Nyghk! It's moe<n>to the very last drop!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And this is?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The alternative for a dueling glove!<n>Because I wish
not to put a strain our<n>relationship, I will refrain
from<n>slapping you with it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You'll find a pair of socks inside.<n>We've wrapped
them in an effort to<n>make them less
conspicuous—a token<n>of your friend's
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You challenged me to a duel for the<n>purpose of
giving me a pair of<n>socks?! Ahahaha! That concept
of<n>yours—skill enhancement through<n>pure
auto-suggestion—I find it<n>fascinating!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But examining you would take a great<n>amount of
time that I simply do not<n>have. There are more
pressing<n>experiments I must attend to.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As for the socks... I've already gone<n>half a day
wearing this pair, so it<n>shouldn't be too much
trouble to<n>finish the rest with them. Now, if<n>you'll
excuse me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I say! What a marvelous opponent!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How casually she insinuates to<n>Digital that
concern is not needed...<n>and with such kindness!
The spirit of<n>friendship between them stirs my
heart!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And yet... Digital. Why the long face?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The duel... Ghhh... I wanted to see you<n>duel!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! I see! Despondent over the<n>missed
opportunity to gaze upon my<n>heroic visage, eh?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: In that case, I'll be sure to invite youto my next performance ofHaoengrin!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hwoagh! That sounds bliss inducing!<n>I'll need to
bring a whole bath towel<n>to soak up my tears!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems the "moe" situation Agnes<n>Digital
encountered has fully washed<n>away her worries.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Let us color your<n>friendship with
elegance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, my fair lady. Might I<n>trouble you for a
moment? You see,<n>my friend here and I are
looking for<n>someone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We're trying to find the owner of this<n>item here.
Digital, if you would be so<n>kind.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right! We're trying to find an<n>Umamusume
whose legs fit these<n>socks perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind if we tried them on<n>your lovely
calves, Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I don't mind being a subject<n>in your test.
Go ahead and put them<n>on me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...You want me to do it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're the one running this<n>experiment, no? You
must operate<n>with your own hands if you're to
ensure your results are accurate!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
True, the burden is not Tachyon's to<n>bear. Prove
your mettle, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Go right ahead. Although, it'll<n>probably be easier if
you come a bit<n>closer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Th-th-th-th...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This is beyond my wildest dreeeams!<n>It's too
much moe to handle!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital flees the scene with an<n>expression
torn between joy and<n>tears.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... It appears that's the limit to<n>how close
she can get to me. Next, I'll<n>need to conduct a
thorough analysis<n>of her mental state.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. It appears the one truly being
experimented on was Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, and I'll go ahead and take this.<n>Now that I
think of it, these socks I<n>have on today might be a
bit loose.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hand over the new socks to Agnes<n>Tachyon.
With that accomplished, I go<n>looking for Agnes
Digital to report on<n>our success.
